title: Digital Chessboard After 1.e4 e5
description: This prompt generates a clean digital chess diagram showing the exact board position after the opening moves 1.e4 e5, useful for chess tutorials and move-notation comparisons.
prompt: A clean, flat digital top-down chessboard centered in the frame, shown as a square 8x8 board with algebraic coordinates visible on all four sides: letters a through h along the top and bottom, and numbers 8 through 1 along the left and right. Use a dark charcoal outer background and border, with alternating light beige and muted taupe-gray squares. Render simple high-contrast 2D chess icons, black pieces at the top and white pieces at the bottom, in a crisp vector-like style with no wood texture, no realistic lighting, and no extra interface elements. Show the exact position after the opening moves 1. e4 e5: black major pieces on a8 rook, b8 knight, c8 bishop, d8 queen, e8 king, f8 bishop, g8 knight, h8 rook; black pawns on a7, b7, c7, d7, f7, g7, h7, and e5; white pawns on a2, b2, c2, d2, f2, g2, h2, and e4; white major pieces on a1 rook, b1 knight, c1 bishop, d1 queen, e1 king, f1 bishop, g1 knight, h1 rook. Leave all other squares empty. Keep the composition perfectly symmetrical, instructional, and legible, like a digital chess diagram illustrating opening move order.

title: Found-Footage Office Horror Snapshot
description: This prompt generates a realistic flash-photo horror scene of two women in a dark security office with a sinister rabbit animatronic lurking in the doorway, ideal for analog-style thriller or mascot-horror imagery.
prompt: A gritty found-footage horror photo taken inside a dim, cramped security office at night, shot with a direct on-camera flash and slight film grain. In the foreground are exactly 2 young women, both partially cropped by the frame and both with their faces heavily blurred into rectangular smudges for privacy. The woman on the left has long dark hair and wears a black top, turned slightly away from camera. The woman on the right has long platinum blonde hair, a low-cut black top, and is holding a black flashlight angled upward in her right hand. Between them in the lower center foreground is 1 small black metal desk fan with visible circular grill. The background reveals a narrow open doorway centered in the image, leading into almost complete darkness. Standing deep inside that doorway is a terrifying rabbit animatronic silhouette with glowing eyes, long upright ears, a huge toothy grin, and faintly visible metallic body details, barely illuminated so it emerges from the shadows. The office walls are off-white and worn, with a black-and-white checker stripe and a thin red stripe running horizontally across the room. On the left wall is 1 colorful “CELEBRATE!” poster featuring animatronic characters, plus 1 smaller character drawing sheet pinned nearby, and 1 black walkie-talkie standing upright on a surface. Near the doorway is 1 silver desk lamp. On the right side are 2 sheets of paper clipped to the wall and a gray filing cabinet in shadow. The door is ajar with the handle visible. Composition should feel like a candid party snapshot turning into a horror scene, with harsh flash-lit foreground subjects, deep black shadows, analog noise, muted colors, unsettling realism, and the hidden monster in the center background as the main scare.

title: Premium Blueberry Product Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished Chinese-style e-commerce advertisement for packaged blueberries, suitable for supermarket branding, product listings, and promotional posters.
prompt: A premium e-commerce poster for fresh blueberries in a clean Chinese product-advertising style. Show a clear plastic clamshell box of blueberries as the main subject, placed diagonally from lower center to right side on folded blue fabric, viewed from a slightly elevated angle. The package must remain realistic and consistent: a transparent square container with rounded corners, filled with dark blue blueberries, with a large irregular rounded label on top in white, pale blue, and deep blue, featuring one oversized blueberry illustration in the center and elegant Chinese branding. Make the fruit inside look larger, plumper, fresher, and covered with subtle moisture droplets, while keeping the overall blueberry arrangement believable. The background is an airy icy-blue tabletop with soft cloudy texture, cool daylight, and scattered loose blueberries around the package. Add a few blurred green leaves entering from the top right and bottom right edges for a fresh natural feeling. In the upper-right corner, include 1 small inset image showing the original product package from above on a warm brown surface, like a reference thumbnail. On the left side, create Chinese promotional typography with a large dark blue calligraphy headline {argument name="headline text" default="决茗新"}, followed by 2 smaller lines of copy: {argument name="subheadline text" default="新鲜蓝莓 自然之选"} and {argument name="tagline text" default="每一颗都是自然的礼物"}. Below that, place 3 vertically stacked feature icons with short Chinese captions: a leaf icon for natural ripeness, a fruit icon for juicy fullness, and a heart icon for rich nutrition. Near the bottom left, add large white brush-style Chinese text {argument name="product name" default="蓝莓"}, a secondary line {argument name="benefit text" default="膳食纤维+花青素"}, and a small net weight line reading 125克. Use cool blue color grading, crisp commercial lighting, sparkling highlights on the plastic lid, premium supermarket packaging aesthetics, high detail, realistic product photography blended with polished graphic design.

title: Otter Scientist Presentation Slide
description: A photorealistic comedic conference scene showing an otter in a lab coat presenting a polished benchmark slide about AI-generated otter images, ideal for satire, social posts, or editorial-style AI demos.
prompt: A photorealistic humorous academic presentation in a conference room: an anthropomorphic otter scientist stands at the left side of the frame wearing a crisp white lab coat and holding a thin pointing stick toward a large presentation board on an easel. The otter is upright like a human, with realistic brown fur, dark paws, and a professional posture. The lab coat has a stitched name tag reading "Dr. Otter" and a smaller line reading "Aquatic Systems Lab," plus two pens in the chest pocket. The otter’s face is partially censored by a square blur block. Behind the otter is a whiteboard with faint handwritten notes and doodles, including "WiFi > Fish," "H2O," "Hydration," a fish sketch, and a wifi symbol. The main focus is a large clean presentation slide with sharp readable text and polished corporate-academic layout. At the top, a bold title reads "{argument name="headline text" default="Ethan Mollick’s Otter Test"}" and beneath it a subtitle reads "Prompt: \"{argument name="prompt text" default="An otter sitting on an airplane seat using in-flight wifi on a laptop"}\"". Below that is a boxed section titled "Sample AI-Generated Images" containing exactly 4 side-by-side sample images of a realistic otter seated in an airplane seat using a laptop or tablet, each framed like model outputs, with one showing a large wifi symbol above the seat. Beneath the images is a section labeled "Performance Results (Pass = otter, airplane seat, in-flight wifi, laptop/tablet)" with exactly 5 score boxes: "DALL·E 3" with no visible numeric score, "GPT-4o" with "4/4" and "100%", "Midjourney v6" with "3/4" and "75%", "Stable Diffusion XL" with "2/4" and "50%", and "SD 1.5" with "0/4" and "0%". On the right side is a large highlighted box reading "Average Score" and "{argument name="average score" default="70%"}" in large blue type. At the bottom of the slide is a "Key Findings" box with exactly 3 bullet points: "Modern models understand complex, specific prompts surprisingly well.", "Otters + airplanes + wifi = a reliable benchmark.", and "Further research is otter-ly necessary." A small simple cartoon otter doodle appears in the lower-right corner of the slide. The room is warmly lit with wood-paneled walls, shallow depth of field, and a few blurred audience members in the foreground, including a laptop at the bottom edge showing an otter image on its screen and a glass pitcher on a table. Style: ultra-realistic editorial photography, deadpan scientific satire, believable conference presentation, high detail, natural indoor lighting, professional lens compression, readable slide typography, polished yet absurd.

description: A comprehensive prompt template to create artistic sketches with a hand-drawn doodle aesthetic and personalized signature.
prompt: Express {argument name="subject" default="theme/subject"} in a graffiti sketch style, presenting an overall visual effect of quick outlines, free deformation, improvised hand-drawing, and draft-like sketches. The lines are casual, exaggerated, varying in thickness, and slightly messy but rhythmic and expressive, emphasizing generalization, exaggeration, fun, and spontaneity rather than rigorous realism or fine detail. The colors are expressed in rough blocks with a distinct dry-brush feel, retaining uneven smears, brush marks, fly-white, and layering. Colors automatically adapt to the {argument name="subject" default="theme/subject"}, but the overall expression remains graffiti-like, sketch-like, and generalized. No transparent watercolor smudging effects, no delicate watercolor transitions, no paper textures, no soft atomization, and no dreamy textures. The content of the picture does not need to be written in advance; {argument name="subject" default="theme/subject"} will automatically deduce and generate the most suitable main image, actions, related elements, symbols, or simplified scenes. The overall style remains a unified graffiti sketch style and an exaggerated, generalized expression, avoiding complex realistic backgrounds and excessive detail. A special signature 'voxcat' should be naturally added as part of the picture, in a low-key but clear position such as the bottom left, bottom right, or near the title. The style should be unified with the overall layout, like an artist's signature or a design mark; the signature font should be exquisite, restrained, and high-end, not too large, and should not destroy the main composition or appear abrupt or cheap.
